summary.next_step: Add HG008 and COLO829 known-answer fixtures for CNV/LOH, SV, and signature adapters before locking thresholds.

rows.required_inputs: validated SBS96/SBS288 mutation matrix plus reconstruction metrics and locked minimum-mutation policy
rows.no_call_reason: SBS3 interpretation thresholds and known-answer performance are not locked.
rows.output_contract: SBS3 activity and QC status with no-call reason

rows.required_inputs: validated allele-specific copy-number segments with total/minor copy number purity and ploidy
rows.no_call_reason: Allele-specific CNV/LOH segments are not available.
rows.output_contract: LOH LST TAI summed scar score and no-call reason

rows.required_inputs: validated somatic SNV/indel features plus production SV caller VCF or BEDPE and CNV context
rows.no_call_reason: Validated production SV caller VCF/BEDPE input is not available.
rows.output_contract: HRD class BRCA1-like probability BRCA2-like probability and no-call reason

rows.required_inputs: locked six-feature HRD model inputs including substitution signatures indel signatures rearrangement signatures and CNV/LOH features
rows.no_call_reason: Integrated HRDetect-style feature classes and model calibration are not complete.
rows.output_contract: integrated HRD probability feature vector QC status and no-call reason
